channel.title: Ad News Feed
channel.description: 広告プラットフォーム最新情報の自動収集フィード

item.title: [Media] 【2026年2月】運用型広告アップデートまとめ
item.description: 運用型広告の主要プラットフォームで2026年2月に発表されたアップデートをまとめました。 今月はGoogle広告がAI時代に対応したキャンペーン構造の見直しを公式に打ち出し、「細分化」から「統合・簡素…

item.title: [YouTube] Watch This BEFORE You Start Google Ads in 2026
item.description:
Stop wasting your budget on outdated Google Ads strategies.
In 2026, the "Old Rules" of keywords are dead, replaced by AI and inferred intent.
👉 Get my Google Ads Optimisation Checklist PLUS learn how to 'Start & Scale' with Google Ads: https://www.definedigitalacademy.com/get-started-with-googl

item.title: [YouTube] Google Analytics 4: Install GA4, GTM, Search Console, Ads Tag #shorts
item.description: Streamline your website tracking! Install Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, Search Console, and Ads tag on your WordPress site. We use Google Tag Manager for a unified setup, making all subsequent tracking easier. #GoogleAnalytics #GoogleTagManager #WordPressTips #WebAnalytics

item.title: [YouTube] Click Attribution Isn't What It Used to Be
item.description: Meta changed how click attribution works, and it's mostly for the better, but some advertisers might see a negative impact. Click-through conversions now require an actual link click, while social clicks and other engagement moved to a new engage-through attribution with a shorter window. Jon explai

item.title: [YouTube] Master Performance Max: Essential Google Ads Strategy #shorts
item.description: Setting up Google Ads for tree services: Performance Max vs. Search campaigns, Google Tag Manager integration, and conversion tracking for phone calls and lead forms. Maximize your ad spend with the right bidding strategy. #GoogleAds #TreeServices #PPC #DigitalMarketing #SEOtips

item.title: [Media] Concerns About AI for Meta Advertisers
[Media] 広告代理店のリプレイスはなぜ起きる？ "選ぶ側"を経験して気づいたこと
item.description: 私は、広告代理店（営業）→事業会社（マーケティング担当）→広告代理店（アナグラム）というキャリアを歩んできました。 「選ばれる側」から「選ぶ側」へ。逆の立場を経験すると、同じ出来事でも見える景色がまっ…

item.title: [YouTube] Google Analytics 4: Easy Installation Guide Revealed! #shorts
item.description: Learn multiple ways to install Google Analytics 4 on your website, from simple plugins to manual code insertion and Google Tag Manager. Choose the best method for your needs. #GoogleAnalytics #GA4 #WebsiteTracking #DigitalMarketing #TagManager

item.title: [YouTube] Concerns About AI for Meta Advertisers
item.description: There is incredible potential for Meta advertisers to leverage AI, but only when in the right hands and trained on best practices. Here's what I mean...

item.title: [YouTube] STOP Performance Max! Start with THIS Google Ads Strategy #shorts
item.description: Avoid starting with Performance Max campaigns! Focus budget on Search campaigns for better results. Use PMax for small tests, not your entire budget. #GoogleAds #PerformanceMax #SearchCampaigns #DigitalMarketing #AdTips

item.title: [Media] SerpApi Asks a Federal Court to Dismiss Reddit’s Scraping Lawsuit: What the Case Means for Web Data, AI, and the Open Internet
item.description: The federal courthouse in lower Manhattan is now at the center of a dispute that began with a simple question: Can a social media platform use copyright law to control content that its own users wrote, posted publicly, and legally own? Reddit says yes. SerpApi says no. And the judge assigned to R

item.title: [Media] Coca-Cola’s ‘JUMP’ Is the Official Anthem for FIFA World Cup 2026 — Here’s Everything You Need to Know About the Van Halen Remake with J Balvin, Amber Mark, Steve Vai & Travis Barker
item.description: When Coca-Cola announced that its official anthem for the FIFA World Cup 2026 would be a reimagined version of Van Halen’s “Jump,” the internet reacted with equal parts curiosity and genuine intrigue. On March 6, 2026, that anthem — titled simply “JUMP” — dropped off

item.title: [Media] Publicis Acquires AdgeAI to Predict What Creative Actually Works — Here’s What Every Marketer Needs to Know
item.description: Generative AI gave marketers a fire hose. Now Publicis Groupe is selling them a filter. On March 12, 2026, Publicis Groupe — the Paris-headquartered holding company behind Digitas, Starcom, Saatchi & Saatchi, and Leo Burnett — announced the acquisition of AdgeAI, an Israel-based predictive cr

item.title: [Media] LinkedIn Is Now Testing AI-Powered Interview Screening: Everything Hirers and Candidates Need to Know
item.description: The way companies hire people is changing faster than most HR professionals anticipated. LinkedIn — the world’s largest professional networking platform with more than one billion members — has begun testing a feature that places an AI agent in the role traditionally held by a human recruit

item.title: [Media] Facebook Marketplace’s New Meta AI Features Explained: AI Listings, Auto-Replies, Shipping Labels, and Seller Profiles — Everything Sellers Need to Know in 2026
item.description: If you have ever listed something on Facebook Marketplace and found yourself answering the same “Is this still available?” message fifteen times before noon, Meta has been paying attention. In March 2026, the company announced a set of new Meta AI-powered features specifically for Fac

item.title: [Media] LinkedIn’s Feed Algorithm Now Uses Large Language Models: What Changed, What’s Being Downranked, and How to Stay Visible in 2026
item.description: If you have noticed a shift in how your LinkedIn posts are performing, you are not imagining it. LinkedIn has made substantial changes to the architecture of its feed algorithm, moving from a system that leaned heavily on historical engagement data to one that uses advanced artificial intelligenc

item.title: [Media] Self-Promotional ‘Best Of’ Listicles Are Losing Google Rankings in 2026: The Data, the Drops, and What Your Content Team Must Do Now
item.description: For a stretch of time that ran well into 2025, one of the most reliable shortcuts in digital marketing was hiding in plain sight. A SaaS company, a digital agency, or a B2B brand would publish a post titled “Best [Category] Tools in 2025” — and then, almost without fail, place themsel

item.title: [Media] Google Ads Automatic YouTube Channel Linking Starts April 11, 2026: What Every Advertiser Must Know Before the Deadline
item.description: If you manage Google Ads and own a YouTube channel, something important is changing on April 11, 2026. Google is automatically linking YouTube channels to Google Ads accounts — and it will happen without any action on your part unless you choose to opt out. Advertisers across the globe are receiv

item.title: [Media] Google Search Ads Audit in 2026: How to Evaluate Signal Architecture, Incrementality, and Marginal Returns in AI-Driven Campaigns
item.description: There is a version of the Google Ads audit that most guides still teach. It involves checking conversion tracking, reviewing keyword match types, auditing negative keyword lists, assessing Quality Scores, and examining ad copy. That version was accurate and useful for a long time. It is still rel

item.title: [Media] Why 85% of Pages ChatGPT Retrieves Are Never Cited: A Data-Driven Analysis of Retrieval, Fan-out Queries, and Google SERPs
item.description: There is a gap between what marketers assume about AI search and what the data actually shows. For years, the dominant belief was straightforward: rank high in Google, and you will appear in AI-generated answers. Build authority, earn backlinks, optimize for keywords — and visibility will follow,

item.title: [YouTube] Google Ads Conversion Linker & Clicks to Call Setup #shorts
item.description: Ensure accurate tracking! Learn to set up a Conversion Linker tag and configure Mobile Clicks to Call conversions in Google Tag Manager for better ad performance. #GoogleTagManager #WebAnalytics #DigitalMarketing #ConversionTracking

item.title: [Media] セミナー資料「検索創出型マーケティング（SCM）とは」の送付
item.description:
検索創出型マーケティング（Search Creation Marketing、略称：SCM）とは、検索広告のターゲットとして頭打ちになりやすい「顕在層（今すぐ獲得）」に対して、PRと広告の連動施策により、”意図的に”検索 …

"セミナー資料「検索創出型マーケティング（SCM）とは」の送付" の続きを読む<

item.title: [YouTube] Google Ads Budgeting: Maximize Conversions Smartly! #shorts
item.description: Launching new campaigns? Be smart with your budget. For maximized conversions and Performance Max, start conservatively, especially in local markets. Watch results closely; launching solo can be costly. #GoogleAds #PerformanceMax #DigitalMarketing #Budgeting #CampaignStrategy

item.title: [Meta] Rewarding Original Creators on Facebook
[Meta] Bringing More International News and Content to Meta AI
[Meta] Transitioning from Nielsen DMA to Comscore Markets for automotive offer ads
item.description: Beginning on June 22, 2026, we will discontinue the use of Nielsen’s Designated Market Area (DMA) for automotive model ads.

item.title: [Media] Client Onboarding Checklist for Digital Agencies: The Complete 17-Step Framework Used by High-Retention Agencies in 2025
item.description: Every agency founder knows the feeling: you close the deal, the contract is signed, the champagne moment passes — and then the hard part begins. How you bring a new client into your world in the first 2 to 4 weeks will largely determine whether that client stays for two years or cancels at month

item.title: [Media] Web Design Tools in 2026: The Complete Category-by-Category Guide for Designers, Developers, and Teams
item.description: There are now more than 1.38 billion websites in existence, and a new one launches every three seconds, adding roughly 252,000 new sites each day. In that kind of environment, the tools a team uses to build and maintain a website are not a peripheral concern — they are a direct competitive variab

item.title: [Media] AI Job Displacement Statistics 2026–2030: 60+ Data Points on Which Jobs Are at Risk, Which Are Growing, and What the Evidence Really Shows
item.description: There is no shortage of dramatic predictions about artificial intelligence and the future of work. Some forecasters talk about a jobless economy. Others insist AI will create more positions than it eliminates. Both camps wave data in support of their views, and most readers are left trying to fig

item.title: [Media] Google AI Mode Now Places “Ask About” Inside Citation Overlays: What It Means for Search, SEO, and Your Content Strategy
item.description: On March 11, 2026, SEO community member Sachin Patel spotted something new inside Google AI Mode and posted it to X. When he clicked on a citation within an AI Mode output, an “Ask about this” prompt appeared at the top of the citation box overlay. Clicking it automatically loaded a n

item.title: [Media] Meta Edits App Gets Freeze Frame, Personalized Sound Effects & Voiceover Teleprompter — The Complete 2026 Feature Guide for Creators and Marketers
item.description: When Meta launched the Edits app on April 22, 2025, the goal was straightforward: give creators a dedicated, capable, and deeply integrated video editing environment that lives where their audience already does. No watermarks. No third-party workarounds. No jumping between five apps just to polis

item.title: [Media] AI Prompt Engineering for SEO: Proven Strategies to Rank in Google Search, AI Overviews, and LLM Platforms
item.description: Most SEO professionals have adopted AI writing tools. Far fewer understand how to control what those tools actually produce — and that gap is widening into a measurable ranking disadvantage. Prompt engineering is the structured practice of crafting inputs that guide large language models (LLMs) t

item.title: [Media] Breaking News Is Thriving While Evergreen Content Collapses: What the Data Actually Shows About AI, Google Discover, and the Future of News Publishing
item.description: The digital publishing industry is in the middle of one of its most disorienting periods. Organic search traffic has fallen sharply. Google AI Overviews answer questions without sending clicks. Large language models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude summarize news stories before a reader ever

item.title: [Media] WordPress Gutenberg 22.7: AI Connectors, Content Guidelines, and What Every Site Owner Needs to Know Before WordPress 7.0
item.description: WordPress Gutenberg 22.7 landed on March 11, 2026, and while it does not flip a switch and make your website suddenly “AI-powered,” it does something arguably more important: it lays the structural plumbing that every serious AI feature on WordPress will depend on for years to come. T

item.title: [Media] GPT-5.3 vs. GPT-5.4: How ChatGPT’s Default and Premium Models Search the Web Differently — And What 1,161 Citations Reveal About Your Brand’s AI Visibility
item.description: Ask ChatGPT’s default model and its premium model the exact same question, and there is a 93% chance they will cite entirely different websites. That is not a bug in the system. It is the documented result of two fundamentally different search architectures operating under the same ChatGPT

item.title: [Media] Google Maps Ask Maps: How Google’s Gemini-Powered Conversational Feature Changes Local Search, Business Visibility, and Navigation in 2026
item.description: Google Maps has been the world’s most-used navigation app for more than two decades, serving over 2 billion monthly users. On March 12, 2026, the company announced what it described as the “biggest navigation upgrade in over a decade” — a dual release that includes a conversatio

item.title: [YouTube] Boost Conversions: Website Calls & Actions Guide #shorts
item.description: Learn to create separate conversion actions for website visits and phone calls in Google Ads. Ensure accurate tracking by matching your website's phone number format. #GoogleAds #ConversionTracking #DigitalMarketing #WebsiteOptimization

item.description: Starting on April 1, 2026, the Google Ads API will no longer accept new adopters of Customer Match. As with our recent announcement for the use of

item.title: [Google] Minimum Budget Requirement for Demand Gen Campaigns
item.description: Starting on April 1st, 2026, the Google Ads API will begin enforcing a minimum daily budget of 5 USD, or the equivalent in local currency, for all Demand Gen campaigns. This update ensures that campaigns have adequate budget to navigate the initial "cold start" phase, during which our models lea

item.description: This major update transforms the Assistant from a powerful code generation tool into a proactive troubleshooting and automa

item.description:
What’s changing?

In 2025, Google rolled out changes to support the EU Political Ads Regulation in the Google

item.title: [Google] Announcing v23.1 of the Google Ads API
item.description: Today, we’re announcing the v23.1 release of the Google Ads API. To use the new v23.1 features, you must upgrade your client libraries and client code. All the u

item.title: [Google] Announcing Android Google Mobile Ads SDK 25.0.0
item.description: Version 25.0.0 of the Android Google Mobile Ads SDK is now available. We recommend upgrading as soon as possible to take advantage of the latest features, performance improvements, and API updates. This is a major version update that includes several breaking changes, new functionality for optim

item.title: [Google] Announcing user list management and enhanced audience ingestion for the Data Manager API
item.description: We're excited to announce the release of v1.5 of the Data Manager API, delivering a more comprehensive platform for data management. This update introduces powerful new capabilities for managing user lists alon

item.description:
Version 13.0.0 of the Google Mobile Ads SDK for iOS is now available. We recommend upgrading as soon as possible to take advantage of the latest features, performance improvements, and API updates.

item.title: [Google] Introducing Channel-Level Reporting for Performance Max campaigns
item.description:
Following yesterday's launch of Google Ads API v23, we are excited to share more details about one of the most highly requested features: Channel-level reporting for Performance Max campaigns.

This update provides developers and advertisers with unprecedented transparency into where the

item.title: [Google] Announcing v23 of the Google Ads API
item.description: Today, we’re announcing the v23 release of the Google Ads API. This marks the first release of 2026 and the beginning of our move to a faster

item.title: [Google] Campaign Manager 360 API v4 Sunset Reminder
item.description:
Campaign Manager 360 API v4 will be sunset on February 26, 2026. Starting on this date, all v4 API requests will begin to fail. If you’re still using this version, we strongly encourage you to migrate to v5 as soon as possible to avoid service interruptions.

See the

item.title: [Google] Campaign and Insertion Order targeting will sunset in Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files on February 23, 2026
item.description: In November, we announced the upcoming sunset of Campaign and Insertion Order targeting in the Display & Video 360 API and Structured Data Files. This sunset will take place on February 23,

item.title: [Google] Google Ads API v19 sunset reminder
item.description: Google Ads API v19 will sunset on February 11, 2026. Starting on this date, all v19 API requests will begin to fail. Migrate to a newer version

item.title: [Google] Update your PAL integration for new limited ads behavior
item.description:
The Programmatic Access Library (PAL) is updating user privacy and data usage settings, and requires implementation updates as these changes go live. This update introduces the following changes:

  • PAL reads Transparency & Consent Framework (TCF) data from the device to determine user

item.title: [Google] Introducing the Google Ads API Developer Assistant v1.0: Interact with the API using Natural Language

item.title: [Google] The Data Manager API is Now Generally Available
item.description: The Data Manager API, a new solution for data ingestion across Google’s advertising platforms, is now generally available. This API is designed to streamline how advertisers, agencies, and data partners send and manage their first-part

item.title: [Google] Sunsetting Google Ads API, Google Ads Scripts, and Campaign Manager 360 API Developer Support Forums on Google Groups
item.description:
To streamline our technical support channels, we will be sunsetting the following developer support forums on Google Groups:

  • Google Ads API
  • Google Ads Scripts

item.description: We are rolling out a new Explorer Access level access tier for Google Ads API over the next couple of weeks. This will allow new developers signing up for Google Ads API to gain immediate access to production

item.description:

item.title: [Bing] Decoding Ramadan 2026: Data-Driven Strategies for the Middle East, Türkiye, and Africa

item.title: [Bing] AI web and zero UI: What your brand should do when the web stops asking you to click
item.description: What happens when the web stops asking you to click? Learn how the AI Web and zero UI are reshaping discovery, action, and what brands must do next.

item.title: [Bing] Advanced Consent Mode: Preserving accurate measurement while respecting user privacy
item.description: Advanced Consent Mode can help you respect user privacy choices, maintain trust, and provide the insights needed to measure and boost performance.

item.description: The updated AI Marketer’s Guide is a practical blueprint that shows how AI‑powered search works and the actions marketers can take to drive results.

item.description: If you are running Performance Max campaigns in Google Ads, there is a better-than-even chance that your ads are already appearing on connected television screens — and you may not have set that up intentionally, audited the creative, or even noticed it happening. According to data published by M

item.title: [Media] Yahoo MyScout Launched: How the First Personalized AI Homepage Changes Search, Content Strategy, and Publisher Traffic in 2026
item.description: Search has not stood still for decades, but what happened in January and March of 2026 may represent one of its sharpest pivots yet. Yahoo — a company most people mentally filed under “legacy portal” — has done something that neither Google, nor Perplexity, nor ChatGPT has managed to

item.title: [Media] TripAdvisor Local SEO in 2026: The Complete Guide to Boosting Visibility, Rankings, and Bookings for Hospitality Businesses
item.description: Ask most local SEO practitioners what platforms they prioritize for a hotel or restaurant client, and TripAdvisor often gets mentioned third — or not at all. Google Business Profile takes the top spot, a website audit follows, and TripAdvisor sits somewhere in the “we’ll get to it eve

item.title: [Media] 5 B2B LinkedIn Ad Tests That Cut Cost Per Lead and Strengthen Pipeline Quality in 2026
item.description: LinkedIn now accounts for 41% of total B2B advertising budgets — the single largest paid channel allocation for B2B companies, according to Dreamdata’s 2026 Benchmarks Report. That is a meaningful shift. It reflects a growing acknowledgment among marketers that LinkedIn, despite its premium

item.title: [Media] Google Search “Your Related Activity” Now Shows a Search History Chart: What It Is, How It Works, and How to Control It
item.description: If you have ever typed a query into Google and noticed a small card near the top of the results page labeled “Your related activity” — you are not alone, and that card just got a meaningful upgrade. Google has added a visual chart to this existing feature, giving signed-in users a gra

item.title: [Media] Meta’s New Scam Protections for Facebook, WhatsApp, and Messenger: What Every User Needs to Know in 2026
item.description: Online scams are no longer a fringe problem buried in spam folders. They have become one of the defining challenges of connected life — industrialised, cross-border, and increasingly difficult to detect with the naked eye. In 2023, social media platforms were the origin point of 76% of all report

item.title: [Media] TikTok Now Streams Full Songs via Apple Music: Inside the ‘Play Full Song’ Feature, Listening Party, and What It Means for Artists, Fans, and Marketers
item.description: On March 11, 2026, TikTok and Apple Music jointly announced two features that fundamentally change how music is consumed on one of the world’s most-used social platforms. For the first time, Apple Music subscribers can now play complete, full-length tracks directly inside TikTok, without sw

item.title: [Media] WhatsApp Now Lets Parents Set Up Accounts for Kids Under 13: A Complete Guide to Parent-Managed Accounts
item.description: Messaging apps have long occupied a legal grey zone when it comes to children. WhatsApp’s own terms of service set the minimum age at 13. Yet the reality has always been messier. Parents in dozens of countries rely on WhatsApp as the primary way to keep in touch with their kids, school grou

item.title: [Media] YouTube Commits $20 Million to Teen Digital Literacy: What the Program Covers, Who It Benefits, and Why It Matters Right Now
item.description: There is a growing consensus among parents, educators, researchers, and policymakers that the internet is not going away — and neither are teenagers’ use of it. What is changing, however, is the global urgency around how young people learn to use it. Against that backdrop, YouTube and Googl

item.title: [Media] Reddit’s Report on B2B Marketing: What the Hidden Buyer Journey Data Actually Tells Us
item.description: There is a version of the B2B buying journey that most sales and marketing teams believe in: a prospect visits your website, downloads a white paper, enters a nurture sequence, hops on a discovery call, and converts. It is tidy, measurable, and increasingly disconnected from how business buying d
